update - 7/15/2026

Published on July 14, 2026 by CP

I added a dark mode and comment system. Hopefully, those work fine and aren't buggy.

I haven’t made an update in a while. Imma try to get more into it. I’m gonna end this with a few questions and thoughts I wrote down a month ago.

Is it emasculating to open a banana from the bottom? What is the bottom of a banana called? How do you consider what's the top or the bottom? Is that subjective?

What’s the best way to eat a pizza?

Will AI utilization lead to the downfall of Indian call centers?

How do they get the golden raisin if I’ve never seen a golden grape?

I also gotta fix the date on these post cause its just wrong for some reason.
